india_trends.summary: Known for his on-ground approach, Mobius built one of the earliest emerging market funds and consistently delivered strong returns

india_trends.title: Mark Mobius, pioneer of emerging markets investing, dies at 89
india_trends.summary: Mark Mobius, a pioneer of emerging markets investing, has died at 89. Known for decades at Franklin Templeton Investments, he championed opportunities across developing economies, delivering strong returns and shaping global investment strategies worldwide.

india_trends.title: Electronics imports cross USD 100 billion in 2025-26: Commerce Ministry
india_trends.summary: India's electronics imports surged past 100 billion US dollars in 2025-26. This marks a significant increase from the previous fiscal year. Despite a manufacturing push, the country remains reliant on imported components. Electronics exports also saw growth, driven by smartphone shipments, but impor

india_trends.title: Nvidia shares extend winning run to 11th session; top $200 for first time in five months, near record high
india_trends.summary: Nvidia shares climbed to $200.40, continuing an 11-day rally, fuelled by robust AI hardware demand. The stock is now 5.5% shy of its record high, with investors optimistic about upcoming Big Tech earnings and ongoing AI investments.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: US Sec 301 probe: India rejects allegations, requests for terminations of both investigations
india_trends.summary: India has strongly rejected US allegations of excess structural capacity and production, asserting the USTR's investigation lacks a "cogent rationale." New Delhi has requested a negative determination and termination of the probe, emphasizing that trade concerns should be addressed through bilateral

india_trends.title: Morgan Stanley shares climb 5% after Q1 profit beats estimates on strong dealmaking & record trading revenue
india_trends.summary: Morgan Stanley capitalized on a favorable regulatory shift and heightened market volatility, fueled in part by a major software sector selloff and geopolitical tensions

india_trends.title: India achieves record exports of USD 860 billion in 2025-26: Piyush Goyal
india_trends.summary: India has set a new export record, reaching $860 billion in shipments for the fiscal year 2025-26. This achievement surpasses the previous year's $825 billion. The nation's exports demonstrate resilience against global challenges. Nine new trade agreements are expected to boost this growth further,

india_trends.title: Russian LNG under US sanctions heads for the first time to India
india_trends.summary: A Russian liquefied natural gas cargo, currently under United States sanctions, is en route to India. This shipment, if it reaches its destination, would mark the first such delivery to India since former US President Donald Trump stated India would cease buying Russian energy. India has not confirm

india_trends.title: West Asia crisis hits Dubai real estate: Will it boost high-end luxury property investment in India?
india_trends.summary: Dubai's property market is experiencing a slowdown due to regional geopolitical tensions. This is causing investors to look towards India for real estate opportunities. Cities like Gurugram and Mumbai are seeing steady demand for luxury housing. India's market offers stability and long-term growth p

india_trends.title: NBCFDC logs highest ever disbursement of Rs 613.75 crore in FY26: Govt
india_trends.summary: The National Backward Classes Finance and Development Corporation recorded its highest-ever disbursement of Rs 613.75 crore in FY 2025-26. This benefited over 61,000 individuals, marking a significant increase from the previous year. The corporation also saw full utilization of funds under various s

india_trends.title: Delhivery block deals worth Rs 186 crore see Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, MFs step in; Nexus sells stake
india_trends.summary: Logistics firm Delhivery witnessed substantial block deal activity as Nexus Venture Partners offloaded shares. Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, and domestic mutual funds were among the prominent buyers, acquiring significant stakes. Despite a slight dip in share price, Delhivery has shown strong year-

india_trends.title: ICICI Lombard General Insurance announces ₹7 final dividend along with Q4 results
india_trends.summary: ICICI Lombard reported a 7.3% YoY rise in Q4 FY2026 net profit to ₹547 crore, driven by retail health insurance demand. FY26 profit after tax grew by 10.5% to ₹2,772 crore. A final dividend of ₹7 per share was proposed, subject to approval.

india_trends.title: India-UK trade agreement may come into force next month: Commerce Secy
india_trends.summary: India's trade deals are set to boost exports. The pact with the UK is expected in May. Oman's agreement is slated for June 1. New Zealand's FTA is anticipated on April 27. The India-EU FTA is targeted for this calendar year. These agreements will open new avenues for Indian businesses.

india_trends.title: India‘s textile and apparel exports degrow by -2.22% in FY 26: Govt Data
india_trends.summary: Indian textile and apparel exports saw a decline in fiscal year 26. Exports in March also registered a year-on-year drop. This comes after the US imposed high tariffs. Meanwhile, India's import of raw cotton increased significantly. This surge followed a period of eased import duties.

india_trends.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Thursday
india_trends.summary: The Nifty 50 and BSE Sensex surged over 1.6% after US–Iran talks optimism boosted sentiment, driving broad-based buying. Falling volatility, strong technical signals, and sectoral strength supported bullish momentum despite key resistance levels ahead.

india_trends.title: China surpasses US as India's largest trading partner in FY26; trade gap swells to USD 112.16 bn
india_trends.summary: India's trade with China reached USD 151.1 billion in 2025-26, making it the largest partner. The trade deficit with China widened significantly. The US was previously the top partner for four years. India's exports to China saw substantial growth, while imports also increased. Trade with the US sho

india_trends.title: Up over 650% in 5 years! Multibagger metal stock to be in focus on Thursday. Here’s why
india_trends.summary: Godawari Power and Ispat Limited is set to attract investor interest as it increases its investment in Godawari New Energy Private Limited by ₹50 crore for a battery energy storage plant. The company's shares have surged 27.5% from March lows, reaching a record high of ₹304.95.

india_trends.title: Market Trading Guide: Buy Power Grid and Kirloskar Oil Engines on Thursday for gains up to 7%
india_trends.summary: The Nifty 50 ended higher as US–Iran talks optimism lifted sentiment, with IT, auto, banks and FMCG driving gains. Technical strength above key EMAs and improving RSI signal bullish momentum, though resistance near 24,300 may cap near-term upside.

world_trends.title: U.S. stocks may be moving past the Iran conflict — but these markets aren’t sending the ‘all clear’ just yet
world_trends.summary: No matter how you slice it, U.S. stocks seem to be already moving past the Iran conflict. But commodity markets and other financial assets aren’t ready to turn the page just yet.
